SCP 0.1.3
  • Reference

    Fetch data from the hdf5 file

    FetchH5.Rd

    Fetch data from the hdf5 file

    FetchH5(
  DataFile,
  MetaFile,
  name = NULL,
  features = NULL,
  slot = NULL,
  assay = NULL,
  metanames = NULL,
  reduction = NULL
)

    Arguments

    reduction

    Examples

    data("pancreas1k")
pancreas1k <- Standard_SCP(pancreas1k)
#> [2022-06-21 07:01:13] Start Standard_SCP
#> [2022-06-21 07:01:13] Checking srtList... ...
#> Data 1/1 of the srtList is raw counts. Perform NormalizeData(logCPM) on the data ...
#> Perform FindVariableFeatures on the data 1/1 of the srtList...
#> Use the separate HVF from the existed HVF in srtList...
#> [2022-06-21 07:01:15] Finished checking.
#> Perform ScaleData on the data...
#> Perform linear dimension reduction (pca) on the data...
#> Perform FindClusters (louvain) on the data...
#> Reorder clusters...
#> Perform nonlinear dimension reduction (umap) on the data...
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> [2022-06-21 07:01:31] Standard_SCP done
#> Elapsed time: 18.5 secs 
PrepareSCExplorer(pancreas1k, base_dir = "./SCExplorer")
#> Create SCExplorer base directory: /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer
#> Set the project name of each seurat object in the list to their dataset name
#> Write the expression matrix to hdf5 file: /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Data.hdf5
#> Write the meta information to hdf5 file: /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
FetchH5("./SCExplorer/Data.hdf5", "./SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5", features = "Isl1", reduction = "UMAP")
#> Warning: Cannot add objects with duplicate keys (offending key: StandardpcaUMAP2D_), setting key to 'standardpcaumap2d_'
#> Warning: Cannot add objects with duplicate keys (offending key: StandardpcaUMAP3D_), setting key to 'standardpcaumap3d_'
#> An object of class Seurat 
#> 1 features across 1000 samples within 1 assay 
#> Active assay: RNA (1 features, 0 variable features)
#>  5 dimensional reductions calculated: StandardUMAP2D, StandardUMAP3D, StandardpcaUMAP2D, StandardpcaUMAP3D, UMAP
